member.summary: WCF service for CATI console. Contains methods that does not require SSL encryption.

member.name: M:Confirmit.CATI.Backend.WcfServices.External.ConsoleService.ConsoleStateService.GetState
member.summary: It is the request for the current interview and interviewer state.
member.remarks: CATI console calls this method to find out: - the login state of the interviewer - the login to dialer state of the interviewer - the previously started by StartInterview method interview and obtain the interview URL in order to start it on Confirmit - that another a new interview was started - that there are no calls for the interviewer - ...

member.name: M:Confirmit.CATI.Backend.WcfServices.External.ConsoleService.ConsoleStateService.KeepAlive
member.summary: CATI console must call this function each "KeepAliveTimeout" seconds. (CATI console obtains "KeepAliveTimeout" from ConsoleService at login). It allows Fusion realize that CATI console user is alive.
member.example: User didn't log out via "Logout" but closed the CATI console or turned off the computer. So in "KeepAliveTimeout" seconds ConsoleService will find out that user does not keep alive and ConsoleService will logout the user automatically.

member.name: T:Confirmit.CATI.Backend.WcfServices.External.ConsoleService.ConsoleService
member.summary:
Stateless CATI Console WCF Web Service.
One of the main ConsoleService tasks is to provide CATI console with interview URLs using CATI task table. CATI console uses the result URLs in order to start interviews on Confirmit.
Interviewer authentication is being done during each call of service method. Interviewer login and password are transfered via ServiceSecurityContext and validated in CustomUserNameValidator class.
Login to ConsoleService service.
member.param: The properties required for CATI console.

member.name: M:Confirmit.CATI.Backend.WcfServices.External.ConsoleService.ConsoleService.LoginToDialer(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean@)
member.summary: The method initiates an interviewer login to the dialler. CATI console calls this method if there is a dialer in the system.
member.param: Survey Id can be null or empty for AUTOMATIC users.
member.remarks: Confirmit surveyId like pNNNNNNN is used. Login to dialer operation is asynchronous. CATI console must call GetState method to find out if login to MN dialer has finished.

member.name: M:Confirmit.CATI.Backend.WcfServices.External.ConsoleService.ConsoleService.GetPersonMode
member.summary: Returns the mode of the logged in person. Throws "ThePersonIsNotLoggedIn" exception if there is no logged in person.

member.name: M:Confirmit.CATI.Backend.WcfServices.External.ConsoleService.ConsoleService.SetPendingLogout(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Notifies Fusion if the logged in person wants to logout. If the person has no active interviews then the function initiates logout process.
member.param: true if the person wants to logout, false if the person wants to continue his/her session

member.name: M:Confirmit.CATI.Backend.WcfServices.External.ConsoleService.ConsoleService.ConfirmLogout
member.summary: CATI console calls the method at the end of the interviewer session. CATI console must call it if and only if the interviewer login state becomes NOT_LOGGED_IN

member.name: M:Confirmit.CATI.Backend.WcfServices.External.ConsoleService.ConsoleService.UpdatePersonMode(System.Int32)
member.summary: Updates person task choice mode Uses when interviwer has "CHOICE" mode

member.name: M:Confirmit.CATI.Backend.WcfServices.External.ConsoleService.ConsoleService.StartInterview(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: It is the request to start an interview for the logged in person.
member.remarks:
The function is used for persons in any mode: AUTOMATIC, SURVEY_ASSIGNMENT or MANUAL. if surveyId == null and interviewId == 0 then ConsoleService considers the user is in AUTOMATIC mode. if surveyId != null and interviewId == 0 then ConsoleService considers the user is in SURVEY_ASSIGNMENT mode. if surveyId != null and interviewId != 0 then ConsoleService considers the user is in MANUAL mode.
Confirmit surveyId like pNNNNNNN is used.
CATI console uses GetState method in order to obtain startup interview parameters and interviewer/interview state.
member.returns: true if the system successfully started searching for an interview for the interviewer, or if there is no need to search for a new interview. false otherwise.

member.name: M:Confirmit.CATI.Backend.WcfServices.External.ConsoleService.ConsoleService.CreateNewInterview(System.String)
member.summary: It is the request to create a new interview for the logged in person. Can be used only in MANUAL mode

member.summary: Returns the array of opened surveys available for the logged in person. The function is used for persons in MANUAL and SURVEY_ASSIGNMENT modes.

member.name: M:Confirmit.CATI.Backend.WcfServices.External.ConsoleService.ConsoleService.Dial(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: The method initiates dial process. CATI console can call this method only if there is a dialer in the system.
member.returns: true if dialing process was successfully stfalse, false otherwise.
member.remarks: Dial operation is asynchronous. CATI console must call GetState method to find out if dialing process has finished.

member.name: M:Confirmit.CATI.Backend.WcfServices.External.ConsoleService.ConsoleService.CancelDialing
member.summary: The method cancels the dial process. CATI console can call this method only if there is a dialer in the system.
member.returns: true if cancel dialing process was successfully stfalse, false otherwise.
member.remarks:
CancelDialing operation is asynchronous. CATI console must call GetState method to find out if dialing process has finished.
!The function is not supported for the moment. It is reserved for future needs.

member.returns: true if hangup succeeded, false if an error occurred during hangup.
member.remarks: We suppose Hangup operation is synchronous.

member.name: T:Confirmit.CATI.Backend.WcfServices.External.ConsoleAuthorizationService.ConsoleAuthorizationService
member.summary: WCF Service called first by CATI Console to authorize user and to get CATI company id (that is needed to call right ConsoleService)

member.name: M:Confirmit.CATI.Backend.WcfServices.External.ConsoleAuthorizationService.ConsoleAuthorizationService.AuthorizeAndReturnCompanyId(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets CATI company id for authorized user. Throws InvalidInterviewerCredentialsException if no such CATI company found or user not found or user is not authorized. Throws PasswordExpiredException if user password is expired. Throws UserAlreadyLoggedInException if user is already logged in from another computer.

member.name: M:Confirmit.CATI.Backend.WcfServices.External.ConsoleAuthorizationService.ConsoleAuthorizationService.IsLatestVersion(System.String)
member.summary: Detects if supplied version of Interviewer Console is the latest one

member.name: M:Confirmit.CATI.Backend.WcfServices.External.ConsoleAuthorizationService.ConsoleAuthorizationService.ChangePersonPassword(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Changes CATI interviewer password. Returns nothing. Throws InvalidInterviewerCredentialsException if no such CATI company found or user not found or user old password is incorrect. Throws UserAlreadyLoggedInException if user is already logged in from another computer. Throws TheSamePasswordException if newPassword equals to oldPassword. Throws TooShortPasswordException if newPassword is shorter then it is allowed by CATI system settings. Throws PasswordDoesNotSatisfyRulesException if newPassword does not satisfy password rules. The method can be called both when interviewer is logged in to CATI console and when not.

member.name: M:Confirmit.CATI.Backend.WcfServices.WcfServicesManager.AdjustServiceEndpointLogicalAddress(System.ServiceModel.ServiceHost)
member.summary: endpoint.Address property actually contains Logical address. ListenUri is real address endpoint is listening on. So, we should change Address to the something that is not depend on port number or URI scheme. To have the same Logical address in case when SSL Accelerator installed or not. In the same time we should leave ListenUri without changes. PS: See http://msdn.microsoft.com/en-us/magazine/cc163412.aspx
member.param: The service to adjust logical address.

member.name: P:Confirmit.CATI.Backend.WebApiServices.Models.Interviewer.CallGroupId
member.summary: Unique identifier of the call group. For an interviewer to be delivered calls automatically for a survey where Call Groups are enabled, the interviewer must be a member of a Call Group. If they are not a member of a Call Group, no calls will be delivered automatically. An interviewer can be a member of one Call Group only.This can be changed at any time, and any changes take effect on the next call delivered. Interviewers who are working as a member of a call group must have the "Survey Selection" task choice, otherwise Call Groups cannot be used. When working as a member of a Call Group, calls are delivered based on the Extended Statuses in that Call Group.
